name: Finalize Spec Metadata

tasks.title: Update intro paragraph and group counts
tasks.description: Update intro paragraph and group counts
tasks.body: The spec's opening paragraph currently says '43 leaf commands organized into 6 groups (Lifecycle, Work Management, Auditing, Documentation, Diagnostics, Integration)'. Update to reflect the actual count (60 leaf commands) and verify the group list. The CLI help output shows these groups: Lifecycle (9), Work Management (16), Auditing (17), Documentation (8), Diagnostics (7), Integration (1), Additional Commands (2). Update the group count if 'Additional Commands' warrants inclusion. Also update any subcommand group lists in the intro (the intro mentions 'audit, task, project, orchestrator, inbox, spec, adr, archive, install' as subcommand groups; 'config' and 'knowledge' must be added).
acceptance_criteria: Intro paragraph states '60' (or correct final count) instead of '43'
Intro lists 'config' and 'knowledge' among the subcommand groups

tasks.title: Reconcile log command with redesign spec
tasks.description: Reconcile log command with redesign spec
tasks.body:
The log command was redesigned per docs/specs/2026-03-21T18-00Z-log-command-design.md. Compare the existing log section in the CLI commands spec (line 552) against:
1. The redesign spec
2. The actual 'wolfcastle log --help' output
If the CLI commands spec already matches current behavior, leave it alone and note that in a breadcrumb. If there are discrepancies (new flags like --interleaved, changed defaults, updated output format), update the section to match reality.
acceptance_criteria: The log command section accurately reflects the current CLI behavior and flags shown by 'wolfcastle log --help'

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Finalize Spec Metadata is complete and correct

audit_enrichment: Verify the intro paragraph count by counting '## wolfcastle' headers in the spec and comparing against the actual CLI command count. Check that the log command section flags match 'wolfcastle log --help' output.

breadcrumbs.text: Updated CLI spec intro: changed group count from 6 to 7 to include Additional Commands (completion, help). The 60-command count and config/knowledge subcommand entries were already correct.

Rewrote log command section in CLI spec to match redesigned behavior: replaced --lines/--level flags with --thoughts/-t, --interleaved/-i, --session/-s, --json. Added three output modes (summary, thoughts, interleaved), session support, glyph formatting, and updated examples. Old spec described a simple tail-like model; new spec reflects the reconstructed-from-NDJSON design per 2026-03-21T18-00Z-log-command-design.md.

Audit of finalize-spec-metadata: reviewed 1 file (docs/specs/2026-03-12T00-06Z-cli-commands.md, ~120 lines changed across 2 commits). PASS. Verified intro metadata: 60 command sections match '60 leaf commands' claim, 7 groups confirmed against wolfcastle --help output, subcommand group list includes config and knowledge as added by prior nodes. Verified log command rewrite: all flags, output modes, examples, exit codes, and error messages match both the redesign spec (2026-03-21T18-00Z-log-command-design.md) and wolfcastle log --help output. Old --lines/--level interface fully replaced with --thoughts/--interleaved/--session/--json. Escalated: 2 pre-existing test failures in cmd package (TestInitCmd_AlreadyInitialized) unrelated to spec changes. No issues introduced by this node.

audit.result_summary: Finalized CLI spec metadata in two tasks. Task-0001 updated the intro paragraph from 6 to 7 command groups, adding Additional Commands (completion, help) to the parenthetical list; the 60-command count and config/knowledge subcommand entries were already correct from prior nodes. Task-0002 rewrote the log command section from scratch, replacing the old --lines/--level tail model with the redesigned three-mode interface (summary, thoughts, interleaved), session support, glyph formatting, and NDJSON reconstruction semantics per the log command design spec. Audit verified all claims against wolfcastle --help output and the redesign spec; no discrepancies found.

task-0001.objective: Update the CLI spec intro paragraph to reflect accurate command counts and group listings
task-0001.what_happened: The 60-command count and config/knowledge subcommand entries were already updated by prior tasks (commits ee65a2a, ca6d317, etc.). The one remaining inaccuracy was the group count: '6 groups' omitted Additional Commands (completion, help). Updated to '7 groups' and added 'Additional Commands' to the parenthetical list.
went_well: Prior tasks had already handled most of the work; only a single-line edit was needed
improvements: None; this was a straightforward metadata fix

task-0002.objective: Reconcile the log command section in the CLI spec with the redesigned log command
task-0002.what_happened: The CLI spec described the old log command (--lines, --level, simple tail model). The redesign spec and wolfcastle log --help showed a completely different interface: three output modes (summary, thoughts, interleaved), session support, glyph-based stage tracking, and NDJSON reconstruction. Rewrote the entire section from scratch to match current behavior.
went_well: The --help output matched the redesign spec exactly, so there was a single source of truth to write against
